_meta.method: Web search and review of Zen á Íslandi (zen.is) and Buddhist Center Reykjavík (buddismi.is)
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~95% of active Icelandic Zen practice (small national footprint)
knownGaps: No active Plum Village lay sangha verified in Iceland
buddismi.is is multi-tradition (not exclusively Zen) — included as it hosts Zen-style meditation

places.name: Zen á Íslandi – Nátthagi (Night Pasture)
places.lineage: Sōtō Zen (Sonoma Mountain — Jakusho Kwong-roshi line)
places.notes: Founded 1986 after Jakusho Kwong-roshi visited Iceland. Current teachers Ástvaldur Zenki and Helga Kimyo. Officially recognised religious community since 1999.
